profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Zyrexindo Mandiri Buana Tbk assembles and sells IT products under zyrex brand in Indonesia. It operates through Mobile Computing, IT Product, and Others segments. The company offers laptops, desktops, servers, AIO, displays, smart tv, and IOT and accessories. PT Zyrexindo Mandiri Buana Tbk was founded in 1996 and is based in Jakarta Barat, Indonesia.
